overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a small Pacific Northwest town after rainfall. The character proceeds down a wet street, crosses an intersection, and approaches a waterfront dock area with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street with wooden lodge buildings

events.description: character approaches intersection and traffic lights become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street toward the intersection, passing wooden buildings and parked cars

entered.detail: rustic wooden building with 'ELDERWOOD' signage painted on the side
red and white triangular yield sign on a metal pole
large forested mountain partially obscured by mist and clouds
overhead traffic signal lights suspended over the intersection
utility poles and overhead electrical wires lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet asphalt street in a small mountain town, passing the Elderwood Lodge building on the right. The street is lined with parked cars and utility poles, with a large misty mountain dominating the background. The character approaches an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with pedestrian crosswalk leading to waterfront

events.description: character reaches the intersection and begins turning left onto the crosswalk
character turns left and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking across the pedestrian crosswalk toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near the corner of the intersection ahead

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
dark green vintage pickup truck parked at the curb
large wooden sculptures of deer or elk arranged in a group near the waterfront
large white industrial building with multiple windows near the docks

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and turns left onto a pedestrian crosswalk. The scene opens up to reveal a waterfront area ahead with large wooden deer statues and a dock warehouse visible. Two pedestrians stand near the far corner as the character crosses the wet street, passing a green pickup truck.

events.description: character finishes crossing the street and continues toward the waterfront plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing forward across the crosswalk toward the waterfront plaza with wooden statues

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the wooden deer statues observing the area

entered.detail: tall yellow vertical banner on a lamp post with text
wooden railing and fence along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the crosswalk approaching the waterfront plaza. Large wooden deer statues stand prominently in the center of the plaza ahead, with a group of people gathered nearby. The dock warehouse building looms larger on the left as the character advances, and yellow banners become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock area with wooden buildings

events.description: character enters the waterfront dock area with wooden structures and boats visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the waterfront plaza toward the dock buildings and marina area

entered.detail: small wooden structure with a sloped roof near the water's edge
rustic log cabin with covered porch and stacked firewood
dense forest of evergreen trees covering the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The character enters the waterfront dock area, passing the wooden deer statues and approaching a small dock building. A rustic log cabin sits on the right while the large dock warehouse recedes to the left. The background reveals evergreen forests covering the mountain slopes, and the wet pavement reflects the dramatic sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked mountain town that gradually opens into a scenic waterfront dock area. It begins by following a character down a wet asphalt street past the Elderwood Lodge, with a massive misty mountain looming in the background. As the character reaches an intersection, the camera turns left across a pedestrian crosswalk, shifting the view from the narrow street to an expansive plaza featuring large wooden deer statues and a distant warehouse. The scene then expands as the character advances past gathered crowds and yellow banners, moving closer to the waterfront architecture. Finally, the camera enters the dock area, passing a rustic log cabin while the surrounding evergreen forests and dramatic sky reflect off the wet pavement.
